member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentStore`1
member.summary: Provides static helpers for generic component operations, including FNV-1a type hashing that matches the engine's Rust implementation.

member.name: F:GoudEngine.ComponentStore`1.Hash
member.summary: Cached FNV-1a hash of typeof(T).Name.

member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentStore
member.summary: Non-generic companion with the raw FNV-1a hash function.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentStore.TypeHash(System.String)
member.summary: Computes a 64-bit FNV-1a hash of the given type name. The result matches the Rust and Python codegen implementations.

member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods that add strongly-typed generic component operations to .

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.RegisterComponent``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame)
member.summary: Registers component type with the engine. Must be called once per type before any other component operation.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.SetComponent``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame,GoudEngine.Entity,``0)
member.summary: Adds or overwrites component on the given entity.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.GetComponent``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame,GoudEngine.Entity)
member.summary: Returns a read-only reference to the component on the given entity, or null if the entity does not have this component type. The returned pointer is valid only until the next structural mutation.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.GetComponentMut``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame,GoudEngine.Entity)
member.summary: Returns a mutable reference to the component on the given entity. The returned pointer is valid only until the next structural mutation.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.HasComponent``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame,GoudEngine.Entity)
member.summary: Checks whether the given entity has component .

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.RemoveComponent``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame,GoudEngine.Entity)
member.summary: Removes component from the given entity. Returns true if the component was present and removed.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentExtensions.Query``1(GoudEngine.GoudGame)
member.summary: Returns a that can be iterated with foreach to visit every entity that has component . Zero heap allocations.

member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1
member.summary:
Stack-only query result that enumerates all entities with component . Obtain via .
Data pointers are valid only until the next structural ECS mutation.

member.name: P:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.Count
member.summary: Number of entities that match this query.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator for foreach usage.

member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.Enumerator
member.summary: Stack-only enumerator. Calls ComponentGetAll once during construction and then iterates the returned buffers.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.Enumerator.MoveNext
member.summary: Advances to the next entity.

member.name: P:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.Enumerator.Current
member.summary: The current entity/component pair.

member.name: M:GoudEngine.ComponentQuery`1.Enumerator.Dispose
member.summary: Frees native buffers allocated during enumeration.

member.name: T:GoudEngine.ComponentRef`1
member.summary: A single entity/component pair returned during query iteration. Provides a ref T to the component data with zero copies.

member.name: F:GoudEngine.ComponentRef`1.Entity
member.summary: The entity that owns this component.

member.name: P:GoudEngine.ComponentRef`1.Value
member.summary: A managed reference to the component data. Valid only until the next structural ECS mutation.
